Summary: E1 Core Physics and Input
Description: Physics foundation and input abstraction for Switch/PC/mobile.
Acceptance Criteria: Core hit/flip input and physics are stable in prototype scene

Summary: E2 Rules Scoring and Turn Resolution
Epic Name: E2 Rules Scoring and Turn Resolution
Description: Implements authentic rules including outs scoring innings and tie-break.
Acceptance Criteria: All rules pass functional test matrix

Summary: E3 AI and Field Simulation
Description: Fielding and batting AI with terrain and wind interactions.
Acceptance Criteria: AI tiers behave distinctly and complete legal turns

Summary: E1-1 Create GilliController with Rigidbody torque Magnus effect
Description: Implement gilli flight model with aerodynamic force and torque handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Flip and hit produce believable spin curve wobble

Summary: E1-2 Implement tapered collider and material tuning
Description: Tune collider and material coefficients for realistic drag/lift and bounce.
Acceptance Criteria: Distance distribution matches target benchmark ranges

Summary: E1-3 Switch Joy-Con shake detection for flip gesture
Description: Detect intentional flip shake while filtering idle/controller noise.
Acceptance Criteria: False positive rate below 2% in calibration suite

Summary: E1-4 Swing arc detection from gyro accel
Description: Derive swing direction power and timing from motion data.
Acceptance Criteria: Power/timing curve maps correctly to telemetry buckets

Summary: E1-5 Standard controls stick aim A flip RB swing RT charge
Description: Add controller fallback control scheme for non-motion play.
Acceptance Criteria: All inputs remappable and usable in match

Summary: E1-6 Input abstraction layer Switch PC Mobile
Description: Abstract input devices behind common gameplay interface.
Acceptance Criteria: Platform swap requires no gameplay code changes

Summary: E2-1 Batting turn state machine
Description: Implement place/flip/strike/resolve state transitions.
Acceptance Criteria: No dead states across 100 simulated turns

Summary: E2-2 Enforce max 3 flip failures out
Description: Track flip attempts and trigger out on third fail.
Acceptance Criteria: Out triggers exactly at attempt three

Summary: E2-3 Air catch out logic with timestamp validation
Description: Resolve catch events against landing timestamps.
Acceptance Criteria: Catch precedence validated in edge-case tests

Summary: E2-4 Fielder danda-hit out condition
Description: Detect valid fielder throw that hits grounded danda.
Acceptance Criteria: Out only triggers under legal grounded condition

Summary: E2-5 Score measure service distance formula
Description: Measure first landing distance and convert using danda length.
Acceptance Criteria: Runs equal floor(distance/dandaLength)

Summary: E2-6 Double-runs logic for 2+ mid-air hits
Description: Apply multiplier when rally has two or more legal strikes.
Acceptance Criteria: Multiplier never applies on outs

Summary: E2-7 Two-innings match manager and tie sudden death
Description: Manage innings swaps winner resolution and sudden death.
Acceptance Criteria: Tie always enters strike-off and resolves winner

Summary: E3-1 Fielder interception prediction spline
Description: Predict landing and pathing for fielder pursuit.
Acceptance Criteria: Fielders reach catchable balls in expected windows

Summary: E3-2 Catch probability model speed wind sun
Description: Compute catch success odds with movement and environment penalties.
Acceptance Criteria: Catch rates match tuning table per difficulty

Summary: E3-3 Difficulty tiers Easy Club District Pro
Description: Expose AI profiles with escalating timing and positioning quality.
Acceptance Criteria: Difficulty progression shows measurable win-rate separation

Summary: E3-4 Batting AI timing and risk profiles
Description: AI decides safe vs aggressive swings by match context.
Acceptance Criteria: AI completes innings without illegal actions

Summary: E3-5 Terrain bounce friction tags and wind zones
Description: Implement environment modifiers for bounce and drift.
Acceptance Criteria: Different surfaces produce distinct rebound signatures

Summary: E4-1 In-match HUD runs outs innings attempts wind
Description: Create readable gameplay HUD for all key match info.
Acceptance Criteria: HUD updates in real time without lag

Summary: E4-2 Distance preview ribbon projected runs
Description: Show live/instant estimate of landing distance and runs.
Acceptance Criteria: Preview error within defined tolerance band

Summary: E4-3 Tutorial with ghost replay prompts
Description: Step-by-step onboarding with ghost timing overlays.
Acceptance Criteria: New players clear tutorial in under 8 minutes

Summary: E4-4 Replay director slow-mo telemetry overlay
Description: Cinematic replay system for best hits and outs.
Acceptance Criteria: Replay triggers and timeline controls function reliably

Summary: E5-1 Village field kit day evening variants
Description: Build stylized rural field environment variants.
Acceptance Criteria: Field meets art bible and performance budgets

Summary: E5-2 Character roster v1 regional diversity
Description: Create initial cast with regional outfit diversity.
Acceptance Criteria: Roster approved by cultural review checklist

Summary: E5-3 Animation integration swing catch celebrate
Description: Retarget and integrate core gameplay animations.
Acceptance Criteria: Animation transitions are clean with no major foot sliding

Summary: E6-1 Quick Match productization 5v5 one innings
Description: Finalize quick match flow from menu to result.
